actions.value:
Hi,
 
The new FCA app store regulations require that they approve some of our documentation before we get re-listed on the Google Play Store. We have completed the approval process for the Apple App Store, but are currently going through the formal process for the Google store. 
 
For the time being, Android users can still download the latest version of Edge directly from our website! Just look for the "APK" button which is the name for the direct download option. 
 
https://dl.edge.app/
 
Note: Your device may prompt you to allow "install unknown apps" since this download comes from our website rather than the app store
